requested_items: git commit and PR to main using GitHub Apps
completed_items: Raised web C0/C1 thresholds to 90/85 and made CI fail on web threshold miss
Made API C0 90 coverage gate fail CI while reporting API C1
Added requirement coverage completeness check for all FR/NFR requirement documents
Added web hook/API/auth/utility tests to reach C0 91.87 and C1 85.05
Validated API C0 coverage at 93.36 and documented API C1 81.00 as not realistic for this scope

validation.command: npm exec -w @memorag-mvp/api -- c8 --check-coverage --statements 90 --branches 0 --functions 90 --lines 90 --reporter=text-summary --reporter=json-summary tsx --test src/**/*.test.ts src/**/**/*.test.ts
